nasb.text: So Joshua said to the sons of Israel, “How long will you put off entering to take possession of the land which the Lord, the God of your fathers, has given you?

esv.text: So Joshua said to the people of Israel, “How long will you put off going in to take possession of the land, which the Lord, the God of your fathers, has given you?

cnv.text: 約書亞對以色列人說：“耶和華你們列祖的　神賜給你們的地，你們遲遲不去佔領，要到幾時呢？

ccb.text: 约书亚对他们说：“你们等到什么时候才去占领你们祖先的上帝耶和华赐给你们的土地呢？
